businessQuestion: Which stores simultaneously have high sales, high stockouts, and low forecast accuracy?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    SUM(FS.NET_SALES_AMT) AS TOTAL_SALES,
    SUM(SE.LOST_REVENUE_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_REVENUE,
    AVG(FF.FORECAST_ACCURACY_PCT) AS FORECAST_ACCURACY
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
ON DS.STORE_KEY=FS.STORE_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_FORECAST FF
ON DS.STORE_KEY=FF.STORE_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_STOCKOUT_EVENT SE
ON DS.STORE_KEY=SE.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY DS.STORE_NAME
ORDER BY LOST_REVENUE DESC, FORECAST_ACCURACY ASC;
businessContext: Executives want to identify stores requiring immediate inventory planning improvements.
